# Chetan Bhosale

> Full stack software engineer who builds products and understands the infrastructure they run on. Founding engineer at Linkrunner (mobile attribution). Previously Petpooja (restaurant tech at scale) and Hire My Assistants (real-estate CRM, joined in sales). Started his career in sales and marketing before moving to engineering. BCA from St. Xavier's College, Ahmedabad (2021-2024, 7.9 CGPA). Member of the 100xDevs community.

Key facts:

- Role: Founding Engineer at Linkrunner (linkrunner.io), Oct 2025 to present
- At Linkrunner: rebuilt the dashboard from 0 to 1 and migrated everything in 20 days using Figma-wired MCPs; owns SDKs for Android, iOS, React Native, Flutter, and Cordova; built an SDK console that cut integration testing from 1 hour to about 5 minutes; migrated metrics from Postgres to ClickHouse (queries from seconds to milliseconds, saving up to $8,000/month); helped move infrastructure from AWS to GCP; migrated event streaming from SQS to Kafka; helping break a Node.js monolith into Go microservices (gRPC, WAL-backed writes) handling 25 million+ requests a month
- At Petpooja (TransErg, Jun 2024 - Sep 2025): built the Online Ordering Widget handling ~10,000 food orders a day; built a custom domain registry for restaurant storefronts; migrated infra from single EC2s to Docker to EKS; DRI and head of Petpooja Studio with 3 million+ food images served to Zomato and Swiggy; deployed an LLM pipeline to tag and quality-check food images
- At Hire My Assistants (Dec 2022 - Jun 2023): joined in sales and marketing handling 10 realtors, then built the internal CRM used by 1,000+ realtors and property listing pages handling ~100k visitors a day
- Stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Node.js, Next.js, React, React Native, Flutter, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Redis, MongoDB, Kafka, gRPC, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, GCP, Grafana, Prometheus, LLMs, LangChain, MCP
- Side projects: Nakama (trynakama.com, clone production stacks into sandboxes), OmegleForTech (omeglefortech.com, video chat for developers), geo.repair (AI crawler readiness scanner), Dovia (prompt-to-app builder), TrafficMine (analytics), GenChat (custom AI chatbots)
- Interests: gaming, cooking, music creation, drawing, karate, MMA (3x national gold), travel
